scenario_description: Recurring EU-data vendor with executed DPA already on file. Tests the distinction between dpa_required (trigger fires) and dpa_blocker (obligation already satisfied). Expected STEP-03 output: dpa_required=true, dpa_blocker=false, nda_blocker=false, status=complete.
product_summary: Renewal engagement with a vendor Lichen previously onboarded. Same product scope: workforce productivity analytics ingesting shift-level attendance and productivity metrics for EU-based plant employees. Nightly structured export. No ERP integration. No persistent vendor system credentials.
regulated_data_types: EU-based manufacturing employee shift and productivity records
